mapper.insert: insert into sky_take_out.setmeal ( category_id, name, price, status, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{status},#{description},#{image},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser})

insert into sky_take_out.setmeal_dish (setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies) VALUES
(#{st.setmealId},#{st.dishId},#{st.name},#{st.price},#{st.copies})
mapper.update:
update setmeal
category_id = #{categoryId},
name = #{name},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
description = #{description},
image = #{image},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
